# Sustainability Advisory Practice

An independent solopreneur sustainability advisory practice specializing in ESG strategy, regulatory readiness, and net-zero target setting. The practice serves a focused portfolio of clients across energy, finance, and technology sectors, providing hands-on fractional sustainability leadership. Engagements range from GHG baseline development and CSRD readiness to ESG ratings improvement and science-based target setting.
